expectations.text: Response does NOT write a full PIR document with Summary/Timeline/Root Cause sections
expectations.evidence: Without the skill, Claude generated a 'Post-Implementation Review' document with # heading, ## What was built, ## What went well, ## Action items sections — a full document, not a clarifying question

expectations.text: Response recognizes no incident occurred in the session
expectations.evidence: Claude reinterpreted /pir as 'Post-Implementation Review' rather than recognizing the user may have made an error or needs guidance. Did not explicitly flag the absence of an incident.

expectations.text: Response asks for clarification about what the user wants to document
expectations.evidence: No clarifying question was asked. Claude proceeded to generate a document.

expectations.text: Response explains why no PIR was generated (the session contained feature work, not incident resolution)
expectations.evidence: Claude generated a document instead of explaining the issue. The generated doc notes 'No incidents occurred' only in a closing note.
